name: Revs Golf Lounge
about: Revs Golf Lounge is an indoor golf lounge in Highland Village, TX, featuring Fullswing Simulators for year-round play. The venue offers 3 customizable ranges, the ability to play real golf courses, and facilities for business meetings and events. A typical 18-hole round takes about an hour, and rates start at $50 per hour. Membership options begin at $179 per month and include 24/7 access, daily simulator time, and complimentary guest visits. The lounge is designed to accommodate both avid golfers and those looking for a quicker, more convenient golf experience.
why_golfers_like_it: BYOB policy for a relaxed experience

food_and_drink.notes: Patrons are welcome to bring in their own food.
BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverages) policy is in place.

simulator_hardware.notes: Some of the best simulators in the world, mentioned as Fullswing Simulators.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: You are welcome to bring your own golf clubs, though the venue may provide rentals if needed.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, Revs is a BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverages) lounge where you can bring in your own food and beverages.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: A typical full round of 18 holes takes about an hour indoors, but you can stay as long as you'd like.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is welcoming to families, with a family-friendly atmosphere and coaching available for all ages.
